payload.text:
🚀 MASTER PROMPT: UKK (Uma Krishna Kanth) – FUTURISTIC ANIMATED PORTFOLIO

Prompt (copy–paste ready):

Create a premium, futuristic, highly animated personal portfolio website for Uma Krishna Kanth Chokkapu (UKK) — a 19-year-old tech entrepreneur, innovator, and founder.

He is the Founder of Edu Alt Tech, an alternative education startup focused on personalized learning, live mentorship, flexible schedules, and future-ready skills.

His background blends computer science, AI, UI/UX, digital marketing, product thinking, and research-driven innovation.

The portfolio should feel like a startup product launch + research lab showcase, not a traditional resume.

🎨 Visual Identity

Dark futuristic theme with electric blue, neon cyan, and violet accents

Glassmorphism cards with soft glow edges

Minimal yet bold layout

Large typography for impact, micro-text for depth

Smooth depth shadows and layered UI

🎥 Advanced Animations & Motion Design (High Priority)

Hero Section

Animated name reveal:
“Uma Krishna Kanth (UKK)” with cinematic text entrance

Rotating tagline animation:
“Founder • Innovator • Building Future Education”

Subtle particle system reacting to cursor movement

Parallax background with smooth motion

Scroll Animations

Smooth scroll with inertia

Section-based storytelling animations

Fade-up + scale animations on entry

Micro-interactions

Magnetic buttons

Hover glow on cards

Animated icons

Page Transitions

Smooth fade + slide transitions

Motion blur effect for premium feel

🧠 Content Structure (Personalized)
1️⃣ Hero

Name + animated tagline

CTA buttons:

View My Vision

Explore Edu Alt Tech

Animated underline & glowing border effects

2️⃣ About Me (Story-Based Timeline)

Animated timeline showing:

Early curiosity in tech & problem-solving

Journey into entrepreneurship at a young age

Founding Edu Alt Tech

Focus on solving education gaps, time management, and skill mismatch

Smooth scroll-triggered reveals

3️⃣ Startup & Projects

Edu Alt Tech (highlight project)

AI-powered alternative education

Live sessions + flexible timing

Student-first learning model

Other projects:

AI-driven ideas

Research-oriented prototypes

Innovation experiments

Card hover animations with expansion

Click → modal with animated details

4️⃣ Skills & Tech Stack

Animated skill visualization:

AI & Automation

Computer Science Foundations

UI/UX Design

Digital Marketing & Growth

Product & Startup Strategy

Circular progress bars or animated counters

5️⃣ Vision & Impact

Animated quotes such as:

“Education should adapt to students — not the other way around.”

Subtle moving background

Impact-focused storytelling

6️⃣ Achievements & Leadership

Founder at 19

Startup & community leadership

Research mindset

National-level sports discipline influence

Animated counters and badges

7️⃣ Contact & Connect

Floating animated contact form

Social links with hover motion

Animated submit success state

Call-to-action:
“Let’s build something meaningful.”

⚙️ Tech & Performance Feel

Inspired by AI labs & startup landing pages

Optimized animations (no lag)

Lazy-loaded visuals

Mobile-first responsive design

Touch-based animations for mobile

🎯 Emotional Goal

Confidence without arrogance

Visionary

Curious

Founder mindset

Future-ready

🔥 Final Direction

This portfolio should feel like the homepage of a future unicorn founder, not a student portfolio.

**Envisioning UKK's Portfolio**

I'm now focusing on Uma Krishna Kanth Chokkapu's (UKK) personal portfolio. The concept: a premium, futuristic, and highly animated site, reflecting a dark, electric blue and neon cyan aesthetic. UKK's role as a 19-year-old entrepreneur and founder of "Edu Alt Tech" is central, requiring an innovative showcase of his capabilities. The portfolio will be geared to be highly animated, capturing interest.


**Defining Component Structures**

I've been refining the component structures. My focus is on high-priority animations: name reveal, tagline rotation, a particle system, parallax, and scroll animations are essential. Content will be broken down into sections: Hero, About (Timeline), Startup/Projects, Skills, Vision, Achievements, and Contact. The visual style will incorporate glassmorphism, bold typography, micro-text, and glow edges. I'm leaning towards React with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion for animations, plus Lucide React for icons. I plan to start with `metadata.json`, a basic `index.html`, and an entry point `index.tsx`. The main layout and routing will be in `App.tsx`.


**Integrating AI Assistant**

I've decided to integrate a Gemini API-powered "AI Agent" feature. This AI will function as a "Vibe Check," summarizing UKK's vision in a futuristic manner, directly tying into the "research lab" persona. This addresses the Gemini API requirement and adds a unique element to the portfolio. I have now fleshed out the proposed file structure to include the new components.

entries.description: Application metadata containing the name and description of the portfolio app.
Primary HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font configuration.
Application entry point initializing React and mounting the App component.
Global TypeScript types for the application.
Constant data used across the portfolio website.
Gemini API service for the AI Vision Agent.
An animated particle background component reacting to mouse movement.
Interactive AI vision agent component powered by Gemini.
Main application component with layout structure and smooth scroll integration.
